4b4cbd0f-d004-4f90-a411-4923ba04de17.Text: Any {g|Encyclopedia:CareerBladedancerGlossary}Bladedancer{/g} attacks made with a sword deal +{uip|damage|d4be859eb6d84504aeed852ef248f6fa}% additional {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}damage{/g}. This bonus damage is doubled and gains +{uip|twohandstrength|d4be859eb6d84504aeed852ef248f6fa} bonus damage if using a two-handed sword.

3e84c648-47f6-4269-ac51-e0c91cdb7f23.Text: The {g|Encyclopedia:CareerBladedancerGlossary}Bladedancer{/g} gains +4 {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWeaponSkill}Weapon Skill{/g} and +4 {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerAgility}Agility{/g} for every {g|Encyclopedia:Injury}injury{/g} they are currently suffering and +15 Weapon Skill and +15 Agility for every {g|Encyclopedia:Traumas}trauma{/g}.

b4f148db-9d90-4b45-a676-1b725410e06b.Text: Each attack made by the {g|Encyclopedia:CareerBladedancerGlossary}Bladedancer{/g} increases the {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}damage{/g} of all subsequent attacks they make this {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g} by +15% and increases Weapon Skill and Agility by 5. This effect stacks up to 4 times. Area attacks, burst attacks (including the {g|f:e955823f54d24088ae1fdefe88d3684d}Blade Dance{/g}), and any other attacks that deal multiple hits are considered single attacks.

1ecf325f-485f-4cc9-9191-dcf1746fd201.Text: Targeting enemy The {g|Encyclopedia:CareerBladedancerGlossary}Bladedancer{/g} targets a single enemy, vowing to dispatch their mark. The Bladedancer's next attack against their selected enemy cannot be {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}dodged{/g} or parried. If this attack kills the target, the Bladedancer regains +{uip|Heal|590c990c1d684fd09ae883754d28a8ac} {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}wounds{/g} and gains +1 {g|Encyclopedia:ActionPoints}AP{/g} along with an additional attack this {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}. Targeting self The {g|Encyclopedia:CareerBladedancerGlossary}Bladedancer{/g} strengthens their determination, gaining {g|f:13c43d3c6bdd4ee39f59d54b750c2194}retribution{/g} for one round. This {g|Encyclopedia:Ability}ability{/g} can be used multiple times per turn, but it grants +1 {g|Encyclopedia:ActionPoints}AP{/g} and an additional attack only once per {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g}.

626b0406-90c8-4d3c-95b3-3cd3448cc764.Text: +100% damage and +10 Strength, Weapon Skill, and Toughness.

69e3723c-ebef-4b58-866e-eeff390817d0.Text: Whenever the {g|Encyclopedia:CareerBladedancerGlossary}Bladedancer{/g} kills an enemy, the Bladedancer's {g|Encyclopedia:Resolve}resolve{/g} is increased by +2, critical damage is increased by +5%, and critical chance increased by +2% until the end of combat.

0a4a4e21-4d40-46fa-98bc-62803c6c8534.Text: Once the {g|Encyclopedia:CareerBladedancerGlossary}Bladedancer{/g} has killed three enemies in total or has used a Bladedancer ability three times, the next {g|Encyclopedia:Ability}ability{/g} which requires spending {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}wounds{/g} will cost no wounds and instead restore {uip|Heal|bc9759f0c41a4a3e84300557bea51dea} wounds.
